case_title: CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORPORATION vs. YUEN, DAVID et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR U.D. JUDGMT AND ENTRY OF JUDGMT PUR STIP, DECLARATION, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YUEN, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 654 COMMERCIAL ST., LEASE FORFEITED, DAMAGES ARE LESS A CREDIT FOR ANY PAYMENTS MADE.
